offer: For restaurant owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient month-end accounting causes cash flow gaps. We automate the process instead of manual accounting methods or spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient month-end accounting processes leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Indie Hackers discussions on accounting workflows
DM outreach to restaurant owners with demo video
try_it: Let users try monthly financial summary and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
